columns.extraction_plan: The total number of participants in the control arm (ADT arm) is 193. This information is reported in the text on page 2, in the "Patients and methods" section: "From October 2004 to December 2008, 385 patients were enrolled including 193 in the ADT arm and 192 in the ADT plus D arm." It is also confirmed in Table 1 on page 3, under the column "ADT (n = 193)".
